channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Simple water tweaks
item.description: This mod modifies the game's water by adding an alternative wave effect and a more vibrant color

item.title: Fast Mushroom Harvesting
item.description: You don't need tools to pick mushrooms, it's easy and quick to pick them by hand - now with sound!

item.title: The Crown & The Coalition Server Tweaks
item.description: Server tweaks for The Crown & The Coalition.

item.title: Cannibalism
item.description: Ever wanted to eat your friends? Now you can. Seraph spawn a corpse on death that can be harvested.

item.title: Rift Beasts Belong Underground FORKED
item.description: Fork of riftbeastsbelongunderground.

item.title: Rendered Fat Candles
item.description: Allows creation of candles from Resin/Beeswax, Peat, Rope, and Rendered Fat!

item.title: Pico TrashSlot
item.description: A seamless trash slot that docks to your inventory for quickly deleting unwanted items.

item.title: VS Roofing Mod
item.description: Gridless roof crafting and build system.

item.title: Improved Quenching
item.description: Overhauls the quench and temper mechanics; bonuses based on skill and choice.

item.title: Julz Addons
item.description: A smol mod made for my mates to have fun in VS

item.title: Runescape Metals + Woods + Runecrafting
item.description: RuneScape metals & woods: mithril-runite-dragon smithing, fletching, tiered bows, mega furnaces.

item.title: ReelMower
item.description: Push reel mower. Cut grass, Multiplayer in testing

item.title: PicoStackables
item.description: Multiply item & block stack sizes, with per-item overrides and a live in-game config editor.

item.title: Murlok Vintage Server Patch
item.description: Collection of tweaks for the Murlok server and playthrough.

item.title: Resonator Overhaul
item.description: Per-resonator volume, falloff and looping — saved to the world and audible with Music off.

item.title: Rookhaven Bloomery Iron Bloom Fix
item.description: Fix for Rookhaven Server for Bloomeries making instant ingots instead of Blooms

item.title: Wildcraft x Expanded Foods Compatability
item.description: A work-in-progress mod that aims to act as a bridge between Wildcraft: F&N + Expanded Foods

item.title: Chonky Vessels
item.description: Adds chonkier vessels & more with better storage and spoilage properties.

item.title: Player Model lib
item.description: Library for adding new player races

item.title: Salty´s Immersive: Light
item.description: Makes block light respect walls and closed barriers.

item.title: IRDP's Wet Crops Mod
item.description: Adding a few new moisture-heavy crops to the game. Compat with Paddy Fields.

item.title: Super Firewood
item.description: changes the burn temperature and duration of firewood

item.title: Optimum
item.description: High-performance client fork. Compile-time patches, no Harmony. Same gameplay, faster frames

item.title: FertileDirtPlus
item.description: lets you make higher quality dirt out of lower quality dirt, turn dirt into sand too

item.title: Infinite Jump
item.description: This mod lets you jump like Kirby in Super Smash Bros, but Infinitely! It is a cheat mod.

item.title: SheyderMod
item.description: A simple SheyderMod that supports the original artstyle of the game.

item.title: Rope Bridges Continued
item.description: Adds beautiful Rope Bridges, Continued version, Improves upon the original mod

item.title: Equus: Medieval Horses
item.description: Adds a medieval warhorse to the game that can be purchased from a new horse trader

item.title: Sandy Plaster
item.description: Adds lath and plaster variants for each sand type

item.title: Hook Molds
item.description: This mod adds two molds for hooks for the Butchering Mod
